sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_datetime (id INT PRIMARY KEY, current_time DATETIME);
INSERT INTO test_datetime (id, current_time) VALUES (1, curdatetime());
SELECT * FROM test_datetime WHERE current_time > curdatetime(500);
UPDATE test_datetime SET current_time = curdatetime(300) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, current_time FROM test_datetime WHERE current_time < curdatetime();
